© 2023 / I built this with Jekyll & Hyde & help from @jeffreymoro

About

Hi there! I’m Putri Agustinos.

Currently a second year graduate student at Penn Graduate School of Education in Educational Linguistics. My interests are ranging from the intersection of language learning & assessment, civic engagement, critical studies, and technology including but not limited to Digital Humanities in Applied Linguistic. In Summer 2022, I am partaking in Penn Price Lab as A Digital Humanities Project Management Assistant and I am also assisting international high school students at Penn English Language Program.

I have also engaged in numerous grassroots community-based programs related to immigrants access to ESL education such as Moder Patsala and HIAS Pennsylvania and also previously worked in an ed-tech start-up in Indonesia, CoLearn ID.

In my free time I find pleasures in immersing myself in nature through hiking, trailing, and gardening, also learning photography and birdwatching. Most of the times just reading under the trees or in the library and maybe do fun writing.

Check out my personal informal writing.

Terima Kasih

Thanks for this resources that had helped me build the digital portfolio:

  • Built for Jekyll
  • Helped by Hyde
  • Developed on GitHub and hosted for free on GitHub Pages
  • Coded with Sublime Text, an amazing code editor
  • Fieldwork TESOL Educational Linguistic Course at Penn GSE, University of Pennsylvania

Have questions or suggestions? Feel free to open an issue on GitHub or ask me on Twitter.

Thanks for reading!
